provenance.sourceName: World Cup Oracle curated squads snapshot
notes: Versioned local snapshot for official or curated FIFA World Cup 2026 squads.
All 48 qualified teams are present so clients can render stable squad availability states.
Incomplete squads are explicit and do not affect startup or team ratings.
FIFA confirmed that 48 final squads totaling 1,248 players were submitted for the tournament.
This local snapshot intentionally leaves player arrays empty until the official or curated player lists are transcribed team by team.
Official FIFA squad list exists but the player list has not been transcribed into this local snapshot yet.
